scripts.build: yarn build:404 && yarn typecheck && yarn seo && vite build
scripts.deploy: yarn build && find dist -name .DS_Store -delete && yarn deploy:prepare && yarn deploy:dist
scripts.deploy:prepare: git push origin --delete gh-pages || echo 'No existe la rama gh-pages, se crea nueva'
scripts.deploy:dist: git add dist -f && git commit -m 'build: dist actualizado correctamente' && git subtree push --prefix dist origin gh-pages
